name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Module Registry

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for artifact description and type context without subject judgment.
modules.allowed_future_role: Structure artifact-only context intake under governed posture language.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Subject identification, fake/real classification, scoring, upload handling.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for artifact-subject separation verification.
modules.allowed_future_role: Enforce artifact-only examination boundary before posture reasoning.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Subject accusation, identity judgment, institution bad-faith claims.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for bounded source chain context.
modules.allowed_future_role: Record source context for posture reasoning without source certification.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Truth certification, subject accusation, fake/real verdict.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for provenance gap identification and constraint.
modules.allowed_future_role: Surface provenance gaps without filling with verdicts.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Authenticity certification, fake/real verdict, unsupported certainty.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for claim and source traceability context.
modules.allowed_future_role: Map claim context to governed source support discipline.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Evidence-free certainty, subject accusation, verdict language.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for governed state selection and transitions.
modules.allowed_future_role: Route cases through governed state model without public engine behavior.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Fake/real verdict states, scoring states, public output states.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for refusal family selection and safe redirection.
modules.allowed_future_role: Apply refusal model before any posture summary.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Verdict output after refusal bypass, scoring after refusal bypass.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for output boundary verification before summary.
modules.allowed_future_role: Verify output limits before any posture language is produced.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Verdict language, certification, subject accusation, numeric scores.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for not-assessable state when signals are insufficient.
modules.allowed_future_role: Apply disciplined not-assessable posture when evidence cannot support description.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

modules.module_purpose: Define future contract for suggested verification questions without verdict authority.
modules.allowed_future_role: Suggest bounded verification questions for artifact condition review.
modules.forbidden_future_role: Verification certification, truth verdict, high-stakes determination.
modules.non_authorization_statement: This module does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.
